scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@studybox/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=@studybox/api" "npm run dev --workspace=@studybox/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@studybox/shared && npm run build --workspace=@studybox/api && npm run build --workspace=@studybox/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=@studybox/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@studybox/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@studybox/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@studybox/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace=@studybox/shared && npm run test --workspace=@studybox/shared && npm run test --workspace=@studybox/api && npm run test --workspace=@studybox/web
